Title: [IntuneSA]:[Windows]:[AppDelete]:[Appx]:IT Pro can delete app from admin console and app is removed from SSP/IWPortal and not uninstalled from device if already installed

Make sure the app has been installed on device.
Delete the app from Ibiza page.
Re-login IWP/SSP, to verify the app is removed from SSP/IWPortal and not uninstalled from device.

Title: [IntuneSA]:[Ibiza]:[Windows][Win10RS2+]:[OfficeCSP][InstallStatus]:[ProPlus]:[Required][DeviceGroup]:Verify successful ProPlus (multiple apps) installation is reported successfully in the UI for all Devices in the Group

Step Action: Go Apps->Windows then click Create button
Select the 'Microsoft 365 Apps for Windows 10 and later' option from the 'Select App type'.
For the apps to select, check all 10 of the apps (Access to Word) above the line in the Configure app suite blade.
Step Expected: See attachment (SelectOfficeApps.png)

Step Action: Select Default file format and Update channel in the App suite information,
Step Expected: See attachment (AppSuiteInformation.png)

Step Action: For the group select a device group to assign the app to and make the "TYPE" Required.
Deploy App to group(s)
Select the app in the list
Step Expected: List item should become highlighted and the Overview blade for the app should open.

Step Action: Click on "Assignments" in the Overview blade.
Step Expected: The status from the Overview should close and the UI to select groups should appear. The "Save" and "Discard" buttons should be disabled if there are no groups.

Step Action: Click on "+ Select groups"
Step Expected: The "Select groups" blade should open. The "Select" button should be disabled.

Step Action: Select groups
Step Expected: Click on one or more groups. A checked checkbox should appear next to the selected groups. When one or more groups are selected, the "Select" button should become enabled.

Step Action: Click on the "Select" button in the "Select groups" blade
Step Expected: The "Select groups" blade should close. In the list view, all selected groups should be listed.

Step Action: Select the assignment "TYPE" for each group using the combo box
Step Expected: When all groups have a type set, the Save and discard buttons should be enabled.

Step Action: Click on the "Save" button.
Step Expected: A bar indicating "Saving" should briefly appear. A popup with a green check mark indicating "Success" should also briefly appear.

Step Action: Verify that the app(s) have been installed
Verify that the app(s) have been installed
Step Expected: App should be installed on the device.

Step Action: For the apps to select on the 'Configure app bundle' blade, select Publisher and Visio.
Add Office 365 Pro Plus Suite App
Select the 'Office 365 Pro Plus Suite (Windows 10) option from the 'App type' combo box on the 'Add app' blade.
Step Expected: Below the 'App type' combo box Information appears and 3 selectors ('Configure app bundle', 'App Information', and 'App settings') appear below the information. The 'Add' button at the bottom of the 'Add app' blade should be disabled.

Step Action: Click on the "Configure app bundle" selector
Step Expected: The 'Configure app bundle' blade opens and the OK button at the bottom of that blade is disabled. The 'Add' button at the bottom of the Add app blade should be disabled.

Step Action: Select one or more Office 365 apps as required by the test case
Step Expected: The Check boxes next to the selected apps should have a check mark and the "OK" button at the bottom should enable after at least one Office 265 app has been checked.

Step Action: Click "OK" button at the bottom of "Configure app bundle" blade
Step Expected: "Configure app bundle" blade should close and the "Configure app bundle" option on the "Add app" blade should update with "X apps selected" text where "X" is the number of apps you selected. The 'Add' button at the bottom of the 'Add app' blade should be disabled.

Step Action: Click on the "App Information" selector
Step Expected: The "App information" blade should open. The "OK" button at the bottom of the blade should be disabled. The "Bundle name" and "Bundle description" text boxes should have a red "!" after them. "Publisher" should have a green check mark. If you scroll down, an image should already be displayed for the "Logo" The "Add" button at the bottom of the "Add app" blade should be disabled.

Step Action: Set values for the "App Information"
Step Expected: After setting the "Bundle name", "Bundle description", and "Publisher" and leaving the text box, a green check mark should appear next to the item. When a valid URL (or no value) is entered for the "Information URL" or "Privacy URL" a green checkbox should appear. If any of these items is not valid as described, a red "!" should appear next to the text box for the item. If any red "!" appear on the blade, the "OK" button at the bottom should be disabled, otherwise it should be enabled.

Step Action: Click "OK" button at the bottom of the App information blade
Step Expected: The text below "App information" in the selector should change to "App bundle information is configured". The "Add" button should be disabled.

Step Action: Click on the "App settings" selector
Step Expected: The "App settings" blade should open. The "Update channel" combo box should have a red "!" next to it. The "OK" button should be disabled. The "Add" button at the bottom of the "Add app" blade should be disabled.

Step Action: Set values for the "App settings"  blade
Step Expected: After the "Update channel" combo box has been set, the red "!" after it should turn to a green check mark and the "OK" button at the bottom will become enabled.

Step Action: Click on the "Languages" selector
Step Expected: The "Languages" blade should open. The list of languages should be displayed with a checkbox for each. The "OK" button for this blade and also the "App settings" blade should be enabled.

Step Action: Set values for the "Languages" blade
Step Expected: After clicking on the checkbox for a language, a checkmark should appear in the box. The "OK" button at the bottom should stay enabled.

Step Action: Click on the "OK" button for the "Languages" blade
Step Expected: The "Languages" blade should close.

Step Action: Click on the "OK" button for the "App settings" blade
Step Expected: The "App settings" blade should close. The "Add" button at the bottom of the "Add app" blade should be enabled.

Step Action: Click on the "Add" button on the "Add app" blade
Step Expected: A bar indicating "Saving" may appear. The "Add app" blade should close. A pop up with a green check mark and Application saved should appear briefly and close. The Overview blade for the app should appear, with the "Bundle Name" that was set for the app appearing in the title of the blade ("Test A - Overview" if the "Bundle Name" was "Test A", for example). The app should also appear in the app list (this may require the "Load more" at the bottom of the page to be clicked on.

Step Action: For the group select a user group to assign the app to and make the "TYPE" Required.
Deploy App to group(s)
Select the app in the list
Step Expected: List item should become highlighted and the Overview blade for the app should open.

Step Action: Click on "Assignments" in the Overview blade.
Step Expected: The status from the Overview should close and the UI to select groups should appear. The "Save" and "Discard" buttons should be disabled if there are no groups.

Step Action: Click on "+ Select groups"
Step Expected: The "Select groups" blade should open. The "Select" button should be disabled.

Step Action: Select groups
Step Expected: Click on one or more groups. A checked checkbox should appear next to the selected groups. When one or more groups are selected, the "Select" button should become enabled.

Step Action: Click on the "Select" button in the "Select groups" blade
Step Expected: The "Select groups" blade should close. In the list view, all selected groups should be listed.

Step Action: Select the assignment "TYPE" for each group using the combo box
Step Expected: When all groups have a type set, the Save and discard buttons should be enabled.

Step Action: Click on the "Save" button.
Step Expected: A bar indicating "Saving" should briefly appear. A popup with a green check mark indicating "Success" should also briefly appear.

Step Action: Verify that the app(s) have been installed
Verify that the app(s) have been installed
Step Expected: App should be installed on the device.

Step Action: Verify that the app installation for all users is reported in the Ibiza UI
Verify that the app installation for all users is reported in the Ibiza UI.
